title: create internal links
excerpt: I haven’t find a way to create links within monday from one document to another (e.g. creating a document with a list of quick links to documents or forms spread around different boards and workspaces for easy access) us…

posts.author: gmouraparedes (Guilherme Moura Paredes)
posts.cookedHtml: I haven’t find a way to create links within monday from one document to another (e.g. creating a document with a list of quick links to documents or forms spread around different boards and workspaces for easy access) using the desktop app. I have to open the browser, copy the browser link to the different documents, forms, boards, etc, and then paste them on the document where I want to have the link. This is a waste of time

posts.author: jep458 (Julie Pennington)
posts.cookedHtml: I have the same problem. You can create a public link, but that is obviously not ideal.
